content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt:1-3 claims "AI-powered suggestions", "ad blocker", and "offline" support, but ContentView.swift only implements a plain local array-backed to-do list with no AI/ML, networking, ad-blocking, or persistence code found in the project.
Pierre: Apple reviewers actively test marketing claims like AI features and ad-blocking against real app behavior, and unsubstantiated claims can trigger a 2.3.1 rejection for misleading metadata. The app only has a trivial in-memory task list — no CoreML/CreateML imports, no WebKit content-blocking rules, and no persistence layer for "offline" to mean anything beyond default in-memory state. Either implement these features or rewrite the description to only describe what's actually shipped.
